name: Smartbank
description_short: SmartBank is a full-service bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, credit cards, and digital banking services across Tennessee locations.
description_long: SmartBank is a regional bank that positions itself as offering a differentiated approach to banking called "The SmartBank Way." The company operates multiple locations throughout Tennessee and serves both personal and commercial customers. Based on their website structure and service offerings, SmartBank appears to be an established, FDIC-insured banking institution rather than a neobank or fintech startup. The bank emphasizes traditional banking relationships combined with modern digital capabilities. SmartBank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, personal loans, mortgages, credit cards, and debit cards. They also provide business banking services such as business checking, business savings, business loans, dealer floor plan programs, and treasury management services. Their digital banking platform includes online banking, mobile banking with mobile check deposit, online bill pay, Zelle money transfers, mobile wallet functionality, and debit card controls accessible through their mobile app. Beyond core banking, SmartBank partners with Raymond James Financial Services for investment products and wealth management services, offers private banking for high-net-worth clients, provides mortgage services for home purchases and refinancing, and operates SBK Insurance as an independent insurance agency. What distinguishes SmartBank is their emphasis on security and fraud prevention, including dedicated identity theft protection through their debit card, 24/7 fraud expertise, and explicit messaging about never requesting sensitive account information. They market themselves as a "Great Place to Work" certified employer and emphasize corporate social responsibility and community investment. The company also highlights the convenience of their digital tools like mobile wallet, Zelle integration, and debit card controls. However, SmartBank's reach appears limited to Tennessee based on the website mentioning "locations throughout Tennessee," making them a regional rather than national bank. While they offer comprehensive services, availability is geographically restricted, and the website provides limited detail on specific product terms, rates, or fees. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Debit cards with ID theft protection
Online banking with bill pay functionality
Mobile banking with mobile check deposit and mobile wallet
Business loans and dealer floor plan financing
Treasury management and corporate cash management
Private banking and wealth management services
Investment services through Raymond James partnership
Mortgage services for purchase and refinancing
Insurance services through SBK Insurance subsidiary
Debit card controls and fraud alerts
pros: Comprehensive service offerings including personal banking, business banking, mortgages, investments, and insurance under one institution
Strong digital banking capabilities including mobile check deposit, mobile wallet, Zelle integration, and debit card controls via app
24/7 customer support through SmartLine24 telebanking (888.868.0608) and lost card assistance
Identity theft protection bundled with debit card at no additional cost, with 24/7 fraud expertise
Private banking and wealth management services through Raymond James partnership for higher-net-worth clients
Multiple account type options with interactive questionnaire to help customers choose the right checking account
Established regional bank with multiple Tennessee locations and FDIC insurance protection
cons: Geographic limitation to Tennessee only, making services unavailable to customers in other states
Website provides no information about account fees, minimum balances, interest rates, or APRs for any products
Limited transparency regarding mortgage terms, loan rates, or credit card rewards and benefits
No mention of specialized products for credit building or credit repair for customers with poor credit histories
Mobile banking and digital tools mentioned but no detail provided on functionality, app ratings, or user experience
best_for: Tennessee residents seeking a full-service regional bank with both digital and in-person banking options
Business owners needing comprehensive commercial banking, treasury management, and dealer financing programs
High-net-worth individuals interested in private banking, wealth management, and integrated investment services
Customers prioritizing security features, identity theft protection, and fraud prevention capabilities
diagnosis: SmartBank is best for Tennessee residents and businesses seeking a traditional full-service regional bank with modern digital capabilities, comprehensive product offerings, and a focus on security and customer service. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Tennessee and lack of detailed rate and fee information online, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for specific pricing and product terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: SmartBank offers personal and business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, credit cards, and digital banking services across Tennessee.
